description: Declarative source for the AI Studio workspace tree. The architecture map page is only a renderer; serve ai_studio/architecture_map/index.html and validate this JSON with ai_studio/architecture_map/validate_map.mjs.

root.title: AI Studio Workspace
root.subtitle: repo roots
root.description: Clean AI Studio architecture tree. Reviewed modules live under ai_studio/, while game, feature, and template workspace folders are shown as root ownership boundaries.
